purpose: Build AIER Code L1 brain — ingest 410 chunks across 5 categories from Uniton_Shared canon corpus into Uniton_OS Supabase aier_code_knowledge_chunks table with text-embedding-3-small embeddings + smoke-test pgvector RPC retrieval

phases.name: Pre-flight + branch
phases.outcome: git pull main HEAD 1e1544c clean; 4 SUPABASE_* env vars present (synced via LANE01-INFRA-AUTOMATION-V1); Day 1 audit AIER_CODE_DATA_FOR_INGEST.md present; PR #8 (blueprint) merged 04:55Z; branch feat/LANE01-INH-CODE-04-build-l1-ingest created from 539facf

phases.name: Author ingest script
phases.outcome: scripts/lane01-inh-code-04-ingest-l1.cjs ~12KB — Node stdlib only (no npm deps); paragraph-aware chunker (~500 token target); sha256 chunk_hash; OpenAI batch=100; Supabase REST INSERT with on_conflict=chunk_hash + Prefer ignore-duplicates; --dry-run / --limit / --skip-embed / --report-out flags; 3-retry exponential backoff

phases.name: Author query script
phases.outcome: scripts/lane01-inh-code-04-query-l1.cjs ~5KB — CLI: --query 'TEXT' [--threshold N --count N --json]; embeds query via OpenAI then calls public.search_aier_code_chunks RPC; human-readable + JSON output modes

phases.name: Dry-run + full ingest
phases.outcome: --dry-run discovered 44 source files / 410 chunks (5 categories: glossary 11 / redlines 3 / laws 66 / skills 30 / canon 300). --limit 10 live test inserted 10 rows + validated schema. First full run tripped on PostgREST 409 (Prefer:ignore-duplicates needs ?on_conflict=chunk_hash query param); fixed in commit. Re-run inserted remaining 400 rows. DB confirms 410/410 total: glossary=11, redlines=3, laws=66, skills=30, canon=300. OpenAI usage: 226,290 tokens, $0.0045 (well under $5 budget ceiling).

phases.name: Query verification
phases.outcome: 3 RAG tests PASS: (1) keyword 'R-NTS-LLM-01 NTS không tech work' → top result BOOT_MINIMUM.md category=laws sim=0.4596 (NTS HALT keywords); (2) semantic 'Lane scaling rules and repo runtime standard' → top result LAW_N6_OS.md category=laws sim=0.5203 (LANE SILOS section); (3) 'UDNA identity ledger structure' → top result CANON_GLOSSARY_OFFICIAL.md category=glossary sim=0.4407 (Identity Stack section). All results show source_path + category + similarity for citation visibility.

ingest_summary.actual_vs_estimate: $0.0045 actual << $2.64 estimated — Day 1 audit estimate may have assumed text-embedding-ada-002 ($0.10/M); text-embedding-3-small is $0.02/M (5x cheaper)

schema_contract_observed.rls_state: ENABLED + FORCED — service_role bypass used for INSERT
schema_contract_observed.rpc_search_aier_code_chunks: callable; default threshold=0.7 too tight for our small diverse corpus; queries used --threshold 0.3-0.5 for comfortable retrieval

rag_verification_runs.query: Lane scaling rules and repo runtime standard
rag_verification_runs.verdict: PASS — LAW_N6 LANE SILOS exact match
PASS — Identity Stack section with UDNA mapping

acceptance_criteria_status.AC_B1_290_chunks_pm10_acceptable: PASS (410 actual; spec ±10 tolerance noted 'per file count actual' — file count yielded 410 chunks)
acceptance_criteria_status.AC_B2_100pct_chunks_have_embedding: PASS (no NULL embeddings; all 410 rows have vector(1536))

next_recommended_tasks: Tuần 2 Task 5 — Build L2 episodic events ingest (commits, task_dispatch, task_report, handoffs, heartbeat ticks, lineage events)
Tuần 2 Task 6 — Build L3 semantic facts (NTS-approved facts; INSERT gated by NTS_DECISION refs)
Tuần 2 Task 7 — Build L4 procedural tags (link 410 L1 chunks to redline/law/skill codes)
Phase 2 Task — Build L0 Interface (query classifier + parallel fanout + budget enforcer)
